title: Kojo & Ama Meet Marcus Garvey
blurb: Two friends find a glowing black star that carries them back in time to meet a man who tells every child to stand tall.

panels.alt: Kojo and Ama crouch in a sunny backyard, looking at a small glowing black star in the grass.

bubbles.speaker: Ama
bubbles.text: That's the same star that's on our shirts...

panels.alt: The two children rise gently into a swirl of warm golden light and soft stars, faces full of wonder.

bubbles.speaker: Ama
bubbles.text: Hold my hand. Here we GO!

panels.alt: Kojo and Ama land on a bright 1920s Jamaican street with palm trees and a proud crowd.
Marcus Garvey kneels to meet the two children at eye level, one hand warmly on Kojo's shoulder.

bubbles.speaker: Garvey
bubbles.text: Hello, little ones. Do you know what you are?

panels.alt: Garvey stands between the children, all three looking out at a harbour where great ships fly the black star flag.

bubbles.speaker: Garvey
bubbles.text: Those are our ships. Built by our hands.

bubbles.speaker: Garvey
bubbles.text: Up, you mighty people. You can do anything.

panels.alt: Back in the sunny backyard, Kojo and Ama stand tall and proud, the little black star glowing in Ama's open palm.

bubbles.speaker: Kojo
bubbles.text: Me too. Up, you mighty people!
